content.en:
If they could casually leave the 7322nd Territory through the Garan Chamber of Commerce, the peak realm gods of the 7322nd Territory would have already left one by one.

Besides, the Garanbao ship under the Garan Chamber of Commerce still has to do business, if it makes it easier to connect one territory after another, then what kind of business does the Garanbol ship do?

The reason why the Garanbao ships make money is simply to make bad money, and if the various territories are connected easily, it is not easy for them to make bad money.

Of course, it is extremely difficult to break through the border extradimensional barrier, and the price to pay is very high, so even if it is the Garan Chamber of Commerce, it will not send a peak realm god to other realms casually.

The information of the Ice Ghost Organization only shows that the Garan Chamber of Commerce has a channel to leave this territory and go to other territories, but what exactly this channel is and what price it needs to pay, everything is unknown.

"I still have to go to the Garan Chamber of Commerce. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, his replica body immediately went to the branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

The branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is not in the Ice Wind Sea, there are a total of three extradimensional realms in the 7322nd Territory, and the Ice Wind Sea is only one of the extradimensional realms, while the branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is in the most powerful extradimensional realm, the Sea Rock Realm.

The strength of the Sea Rock Realm is stronger than that of the Ice Wind Sea, in fact, the Ice Wind Sea is the weakest extradimensional realm in the 7322nd Territory, and it is precisely because of the weakest that the Ice Ghost Organization has built a branch in a remote area here, so that it will not attract too much attention.

The distance between the three extradimensional realms is a little far, and if you want to go over, you still have to cross the Death Void, and this section of the journey is a bit dangerous, ordinary peak realm gods may be killed, and high-level realm gods dare not enter the Death Void.

However, the Garan Chamber of Commerce has a treasure ship that connects the three extradimensional realms, and you can take the treasure ship to and from the three extradimensional realms, which is also a business of the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

Although Ye Tian said that he had comprehended the true extradimensional power, there were also extradimensional creatures in the Death Void that were comparable to the half-step extradimensional realm, and maybe there were also extradimensional creatures in the extradimensional realm.

He didn't dare to be arrogant at this point, so he was also ready to take the treasure ship of the Garan Chamber of Commerce to the Sea Rock Realm.

As long as this treasure ship will follow the safe route, and he doesn't know much about the safe route of this territory, although he can buy the safe route, he can also ask other peak realm gods.

But he didn't want to waste time, so he took the treasure ship of the Garan Chamber of Commerce directly, and he could go directly to the branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

Besides, the cost is not high, and he doesn't care at all.

......

Garan Chamber of Commerce.

The treasure ship of the Dragon.

Ye Tian took this treasure ship and went to the Sea Rock Realm.

At this time, there were many realm gods on this treasure ship, and even ordinary realm gods, but most of them were high-level realm gods, and there were very few peak realm gods.

Because the Peak Realm God has a safe route, he can go to the Sea Rock Realm by himself, and he doesn't need to take the treasure ship of the Giant Dragon.

It's just that it's a little safer to take the treasure ship Dragon.

After all, the defense of this treasure ship is extremely high, and almost all of the people who can destroy this treasure ship are half-step extradimensional realms, and there is also a peak realm god with the highest strength sitting here.

The point is that the support of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is very fast, and there is even a way to deal with the half-step extradimensional realm.

If you cross the void of death and really encounter some crises, you will definitely die.

Therefore, some peak realm gods are still willing to spend a little more money to take the treasure ship of the Giant Dragon.

The journey was very calm, without encountering any danger, and he came to the extradimensional realm of the Sea Rock Realm safely.

And the terminal of this treasure ship is the ancient city of Garan where the branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is located, which is also the ancient city controlled by the Garan Chamber of Commerce and the city of trade.

After Ye Tian came to the ancient city of Jialan, he went straight to the branch of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce.

The branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is very powerful, and there may not be a half-step extradimensional realm here, but there are definitely peak realm gods comparable to the Wind Rift Realm God, and there is also a very powerful extradimensional array here.

With the help of this large array, even the half-step transcendent realm did not dare to be arrogant when they came here.

Ye Tian came here, and he was also very polite, wanting to meet the person in charge of the branch of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce.

Of course, if he didn't have a certain strength and status, the head of the branch of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce would definitely not see him.

Rumble!!!!

Wisps of true extradimensional power surrounded him, and seeing this scene, the peak realm god of the Garan Chamber of Commerce was extremely shocked.

"Your Excellency, please wait a moment, and I will inform the god of the Mizusawa Realm. "

Soon, the head of the Garan Chamber of Commerce named Mizusawa Realm God came.

Ye Tian fixed his eyes and saw that the other party's cultivation was very high, condensed thirteen Eternal Realm Spirits, and his physical body was extremely strong, it had definitely been transformed, and the strength of his physical body was probably much greater than that of the Wind Rift Realm God. []

"I've seen the god of the Mizusawa Realm!" Ye Tian said politely.

"What do you call Your Excellency?" "The Mizusawa Realm God is not arrogant because he is the God of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, a peak realm god who has comprehended the true extradimensional power, as long as he is willing, he can step into the half-step extradimensional realm at any time, and it is not something he can provoke.

"Ye Tian!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"'Ye Heavenly Realm God, please!'"

The Mizusawa Realm God invited Ye Tian to an attic of the branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, where they sat down.

"Ye Tianjie God, I don't know what you want to trade?"

The Mizusawa Realm God asked.

"Mizusawa Realm God, I want to leave the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Twenty-Two Territory, I heard that the Garan Chamber of Commerce has a direct way to leave, can there be a channel to enter those powerful territories?" Ye Tian said.

"I see!"

The God of the Water Ze Realm was not the slightest surprised by Ye Tian's request, after all, Ye Tian had comprehended the true power of the extradimensional dimension, and it was normal for him to want to leave here, and there was no chance to stay here.

The God of the Water Ze Realm said truthfully: "Ye Tian Realm God, our Jialan Chamber of Commerce does have a chance to leave here, there are currently two channels, one is that Your Excellency directly joins our Jialan Chamber of Commerce, you can leave here for free, and you can comprehend the potential of the true extradimensional power with Your Excellency, no matter where you go." If you just want to leave the territory of 7,322 with the help of the formation of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, you will need to pay a great price. (yes)

"At what cost?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It seems that Your Excellency doesn't want to join the Garan Chamber of Commerce. The Mizusawa Realm God was a little regretful, and immediately introduced: "If you want to leave this Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Twenty-two Territory, but if you want to choose a territory, you need to pay different prices according to different territories. If you want to go to the next realm, you only need 1,000,000 Galanbao, but you can't leave immediately, you need to wait until you have enough of them to leave. There are many peak realm gods waiting to leave in the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Twenty-Two Territory, and none of them can leave at the moment, they are all waiting. After all, if you open a super-dimensional formation, the price to pay is big, and if there is not enough benefit, the Jialan Chamber of Commerce will naturally not open it. However, Your Excellency is the pinnacle of comprehending the power of extradimensional power, and we are willing to send You away immediately, but we need higher conditions. "

"What conditions, please say. "

Ye Tian didn't want to wait, who knows how many extradimensional epochs he had to wait?

So, to be able to leave immediately, that's naturally the best.
